message.content:
Search the codebase for existing empty state UI patterns to understand the design language. Look for:

1. Any existing empty state components or CSS classes (search for "empty-state", "no-posts", "no-results", "empty" in CSS and JSX files)
2. The current explore page CSS at `client/src/components/HomePage/explore/explore.css` — read the full file to understand existing styles
3. Check `client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/postcards.css` for any empty state styles
4. Look at other pages for empty state patterns — e.g. search for "No posts", "Nothing here", "empty" in JSX components under `client/src/components/`
5. Check the CSS variables available (look for `:root` or `--` custom properties in main CSS files) to understand the color palette

Focus on understanding the visual design language so a new empty state will be consistent.
